data.title: New Gold to Release Q1 2025 Results and Host Conference Call
data.description:
New Gold ( (TSE:NGD) ) has provided an update.

New Gold Inc. announced it will release its first quarter 2025 operational and financial results on April 29, 2025, followed by an earnings conference call and webcast on April 30, 2025. This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor relations.

More about New Gold

New Gold is a Canadian-focused intermediate mining company with two core producing assets in Canada: the Rainy River gold mine and the New Afton copper-gold mine. The company aims to build a leading diversified intermediate gold company committed to environmental and social responsibility.

data.title: VF Appoints Abhishek Dalmia as COO in 2025
data.description:
An update from VF ( (VFC) ) is now available.

V.F. Corporation has appointed Abhishek Dalmia as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective April 3, 2025. Mr. Dalmia will oversee corporate strategy, transformation, digital technology, and supply chain operations. His extensive experience includes roles at Boston Consulting Group, lululemon athletica, and Dell Technologies, focusing on digital growth and innovation. This appointment is part of the company’s strategic leadership restructuring, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and market competitiveness.

data.title: Bezant Resources Gains from High-Grade Copper-Gold Discovery at Mankayan
data.description:
Bezant Resources ( (GB:BZT) ) has shared an announcement.

Bezant Resources announced that Blackstone Minerals has released assay results from a previously unreleased drillhole at the Mankayan Copper-Gold Porphyry project, revealing high-grade copper-gold deposits. This development is part of a proposed merger between Blackstone and IDM International, through which Bezant holds its interest in the project. If the merger is completed, Bezant will receive a substantial number of Blackstone shares and options, potentially enhancing its market position and stakeholder value.

More about Bezant Resources

Bezant Resources PLC is a copper-gold exploration and development company. The company focuses on projects like the Mankayan Copper-Gold project in the Philippines, which is strategically located near significant mining operations such as the Lepanto gold mine and Far Southeast project.

data.title: VH Global Energy Reports 2024 Results Amidst Market Challenges
data.description:
VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc ( (GB:ENRG) ) has shared an update.

VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc reported its annual results for 2024, highlighting a decrease in net asset value due to unfavorable currency exchange rates. Despite this, the company maintained robust operational performance, with significant clean energy contributions and a strong dividend yield. The company has expanded its portfolio with new renewable energy projects in Europe and achieved construction milestones in the UK and Australia. The board is addressing the share price discount to NAV and plans to propose steps to shareholders in 2025 to address this issue, while continuing to focus on operational and financial resilience.

More about VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc

VH Global Sustainable Energy Opportunities Plc operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on investments in clean energy infrastructure. The company is involved in various projects across the globe, including wind, solar, and hydroelectric power, aiming to support the global energy transition and sustainable development goals.

data.title: Sing Holdings Ltd. Announces Board Reconstitution
data.description:
Sing Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:5IC) ) has provided an update.

Sing Holdings Ltd. has announced changes to its Board of Directors, with Mr. Tan Tong Guan retiring as an Independent and Non-Executive Director, and Mr. Choo Eng Chuan being appointed to the same role effective April 26, 2025. Mr. Choo will also serve as Chairman of the Audit Committee and a member of both the Remuneration and Nominating Committees. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance and leadership structure, potentially impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder relations.

More about Sing Holdings Ltd.

data.title: P2 Gold Reports Positive Assay Results and Advances Gabbs Project
data.description:
P2 Gold ( (TSE:PGLD) ) has shared an announcement.

P2 Gold Inc. has announced positive assay results from the Sullivan Zone at its Gabbs Project, indicating promising gold and copper grades. The company has initiated a Phase Three Metallurgical Program aimed at improving metal recoveries, which could enhance the project’s economic outcomes. With an internal rate of return of 50.1% and a net present value of over US$1.4 billion, the project holds significant potential for stakeholders.

More about P2 Gold

P2 Gold Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing its gold-copper Gabbs Project located on the Walker Lane Trend in Nevada.

data.title: Crescent Energy Completes Merger with SilverBow Resources
data.description:
Crescent Energy Company Class A ( (CRGY) ) has shared an update.

Crescent Energy Company, a Delaware corporation, announced the completion of its merger with SilverBow Resources, Inc. on July 30, 2024. The merger involved a complex exchange of shares and cash, with Crescent issuing $750 million in senior notes and borrowing $724 million under its revolving credit facility. This strategic acquisition is expected to enhance Crescent’s market position by integrating SilverBow’s operations, although the final valuation of SilverBow’s assets and liabilities is still pending. The unaudited pro forma statement of operations has been prepared to reflect the merger’s impact, but future financial results may differ as additional information and analyses are conducted.

More about Crescent Energy Company Class A

data.title: Nidec Initiates Tender Offer for Makino Milling Machine
data.description:
The latest update is out from Nidec ( (JP:6594) ).

Nidec Corporation has announced the commencement of a tender offer to acquire Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd., aiming to make it a wholly-owned subsidiary. This strategic move is expected to create synergies in products, technologies, and sales networks, enhancing corporate value and offering a substantial premium to Makino’s shareholders.

More about Nidec

Nidec Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing electric motors and related components. The company is known for its precision motors used in hard disk drives, home appliances, and automotive applications, with a strong market presence globally.

data.title: Banco Santander Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ) just unveiled an update.

Banco Santander has announced the progress of its share buyback program, which has seen the purchase of shares amounting to 653,131,625 Euros, representing 41.2% of the program’s maximum investment. This buyback initiative, which has led to the repurchase of approximately 13.2% of its outstanding shares since 2021, is aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

More about Banco Santander

Banco Santander, S.A. is a leading financial institution in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial services and products. It focuses on retail and commercial banking, providing services such as loans, credit, and investment solutions to a global market.
